title: Rouge Eau de Parfum
description: Discover Karl Lagerfeld Rouge Eau de Parfum, the bold revival of an iconic fragrance—where timeless elegance meets daring modernity in a dazzling fruity-floral harmony.Where red speaks louder than words!What is the story of Karl Lagerfeld Rouge Eau de Parfum?After nearly a decade, Karl Lagerfeld’s signature scent is reborn as Rouge, paying homage to the designer’s beloved shade of red. Crafted by perfumer Romain Almairac, this eau de parfum captures the contrast of classical elegance and avant-garde energy—an olfactory paradox inspired by Lagerfeld's world.Fragrance Features:Distinctive red bottle with iconic geometric designModern yet timeless, bold yet balancedFragrance Composition:The fragrance opens with a vibrant blend of blackcurrant, pear, and peach, creating a juicy and inviting introduction that immediately captures the senses. As it unfolds, the heart reveals a radiant bouquet of jasmine and orange blossom, delicately enhanced by the earthy richness of patchouli. This floral-spicy core brings both lightness and depth, adding a sensual dimension to the composition. Finally, the base settles into a warm, enveloping embrace of ambroxan, smooth vanilla, creamy caramel, and the soft elegance of cashmere wood. This lasting trail offers a comforting yet sophisticated finish, perfectly balancing sweetness and warmth.

itemDescriptionEN: Blu Mediterraneo Mirto Di Panarea Eau de Toilette
title: Blu Mediterraneo Mirto Di Panarea Eau de Toilette
description: Discover Acqua di Parma Blu Mediterraneo Mirto di Panarea Eau de Toilette, a timeless fragrance capturing the soul of the Mediterranean. A luxurious scent blending citrus, myrtle, and sea breeze—perfect for lovers of elegance and escape.Breathe in the Mediterranean!What is the story of Acqua di Parma Blu Mediterraneo Mirto di Panarea Eau de Toilette?Blu Mediterraneo Mirto di Panarea by Acqua di Parma is more than a perfume—it’s a sensory escape to Panarea, a Mediterranean island where time stands still. Inspired by the island’s volcanic beauty and vibrant spirit, this fragrance is a tribute to untamed nature and the serenity of the sea.Fragrance Features:Sparkling citrus notes of Calabrian bergamot and lemonEncased in an iconic deep blue Art Deco bottle, evoking the Mediterranean’s crystal-clear watersFragrance Composition:The fragrance opens with an invigorating burst of top notes, where the aromatic warmth of myrtle and basil blends seamlessly with the sparkling freshness of Italian lemon and Italian bergamot. This vibrant introduction sets the tone for a scent that is both energizing and refined. At the heart, a delicate marine breeze carries the essence of the Mediterranean, mingling with the floral elegance of jasmine absolute and the velvety richness of Damask rose absolute. These notes evoke a sense of tranquility and timeless beauty. As the fragrance settles, the base notes emerge with depth and sophistication. The earthy, resinous quality of lentisk absolute pairs with the crisp freshness of juniper, while the grounding warmth of Virginian cedarwood and amber leaves a lasting, harmonious impression.

title: Honour Woman Eau De Parfum
description: Experience Amouage Honour Woman Eau de Parfum—a white floral fragrance inspired by Madame Butterfly, echoing love, sorrow, and eternal beauty.Honour the truth! Wear the legend!What is the story of Amouage Honour Woman Eau de Parfum?Honour Woman by Amouage is a luminous white floral fragrance inspired by the tragic love story of Madame Butterfly. Created as an ode to truth and beauty, it captures the delicate sorrow of unfulfilled love and the strength of feminine grace. Each note whispers a verse of her story—poetic, powerful, unforgettable.Fragrance Features:Inspired by the opera Madame ButterflyElegant blend of jasmine, tuberose, and lily of the valleyA timeless tribute to love, memory, and femininityLong-lasting with a graceful, lingering trailPerfect for women who wear their hearts with honourFragrance Composition:The fragrance begins with a bold and invigorating blend of top notes, where the sharp, spicy kick of pepper intertwines with the tangy freshness of rhubarb leaves. Coriander adds an herbal depth, creating an opening that is both vibrant and intriguing. As the scent evolves, it unfurls into a rich and floral heart. The essence of jasmine weaves seamlessly with the creamy sweetness of tuberose, while gardenia adds a touch of elegance. Lily of the valley brings a delicate, fresh sweetness, balanced by the soft, spicy warmth of carnation. Together, these heart notes create a symphony of floral opulence that feels both romantic and sophisticated. The fragrance then settles into its base, where vetiver grounds the composition with its woody, smoky character. Frankincense adds a resinous, slightly mystical quality, while amber introduces warmth and a golden glow. Opoponax, with its sweet, balsamic undertones, further enhances the fragrance’s richness. Leather adds a luxurious, subtly animalistic touch, bringing depth and lasting power to this beautifully complex scent.
full_description: Amouage Honour Woman Eau de Parfum Experience Amouage Honour Woman Eau de Parfum—a white floral fragrance inspired by Madame Butterfly, echoing love, sorrow, and eternal beauty.Honour the truth! Wear the legend!What is the story of Amouage Honour Woman Eau de Parfum?Honour Woman by Amouage is a luminous white floral fragrance inspired by the tragic love story of Madame Butterfly. Created as an ode to truth and beauty, it captures the delicate sorrow of unfulfilled love and the strength of feminine grace. Each note whispers a verse of her story—poetic, powerful, unforgettable.Fragrance Features:Inspired by the opera Madame ButterflyElegant blend of jasmine, tuberose, and lily of the valleyA timeless tribute to love, memory, and femininityLong-lasting with a graceful, lingering trailPerfect for women who wear their hearts with honourFragrance Composition:The fragrance begins with a bold and invigorating blend of top notes, where the sharp, spicy kick of pepper intertwines with the tangy freshness of rhubarb leaves. Coriander adds an herbal depth, creating an opening that is both vibrant and intriguing. As the scent evolves, it unfurls into a rich and floral heart. The essence of jasmine weaves seamlessly with the creamy sweetness of tuberose, while gardenia adds a touch of elegance. Lily of the valley brings a delicate, fresh sweetness, balanced by the soft, spicy warmth of carnation. Together, these heart notes create a symphony of floral opulence that feels both romantic and sophisticated. The fragrance then settles into its base, where vetiver grounds the composition with its woody, smoky character. Frankincense adds a resinous, slightly mystical quality, while amber introduces warmth and a golden glow. Opoponax, with its sweet, balsamic undertones, further enhances the fragrance’s richness. Leather adds a luxurious, subtly animalistic touch, bringing depth and lasting power to this beautifully complex scent.

title: Idebenone + Blackberry Complex Serum - Anti Aging Complex for All Skin Types
description: The Idebenone + Blackberry Complex Serum is designed to be quickly absorbed into the skin. Its highly concentrated Idebenone works in harmony with Blackberry Complex to maximize the serum's antioxidant effect on the skin.This hypoallergenic serum is specially formulated with 1,000 ppm of Idebenone and 20% Blackberry Complex, two potent antioxidants that help reverse signs of aging while protecting the skin from environmental irritants.The most powerful skin antioxidant.The key feature of this product is its utilization of advanced technology to extract raw Idebenone, increasing its solubility and improving the skin's ability to absorb it. This ensures that the skin benefits from all the goodness of Idebenone in the serum. Moreover, the formulation incorporates the potent antioxidant effects of anthocyanins, creating the most effective combination of ingredients for radiant, glowing skin.Idebenone has been gaining more recognition in the beauty industry due to its abundant antioxidant benefits and is often compared to the naturally occurring compound, Coenzyme Q10. Idebenone skincare products are generally well-tolerated by all skin types and are an alternative for treating fine lines and rejuvenating sensitive skin.**The pipette for this product was changed in January 2023 by the brand. You may receive a white or black pipette product.This product contains:1000 ppm of Idebenone - antioxidant;20% of Blackberry Complex (Anthocyanins and flavonoids) - antioxidant;Arginine - wrinkle soothing and skin pumpling.Máry & May's entire product range is devoid of :Paraben, isothiazolinones, imidazolidinyl urea, BHA, benzalkonium chloride, diazolidinyl urea, BHA, benzalkonium chloride, diazolidinyl urea, BHT, 0-Cymen-5-ol, sorbic acid, thymol, phenoxyethanol, isopropyl alcohol;Diisononyl phthalate;Triethanolamine, sodium lauryl sulfate, sodium laureth sulfate;Benzophenone-3, butyl methoxydibenzoylmethane;the brand uses a tiny amount (less than 1%) of harmless, allergen-free scents in only some of its products to make the inherent scents of natural ingredients more appealing.

title: Eyeliner 24H Drama Liquid Pencil
description: 24H Drama Liquid Pencil is a gel eyeliner pencil that glides perfectly, achieving an intense and lasting color with just one pass.  Available in 8 shades and 3 finishes: matte, metallic and shiny.   Dramatic looks that last all day!   PRO Tip:  * For brown eyes, try the hottest and gold tones like blue (Parisian Night), violet (Purple Cabaret) and petroleum blue (Seine Sparkles).  * For green eyes, put black on the line of the lower eyelashes to correct any redness, and try purple (Purple Cabaret), olive green (Green Metropolitan) and coppery shades (French Chocolate).  * For blue eyes, try brown, bronze, golden (Leading Lights) or dark blues (Parisian Night) tones.
